title: sorghum bicolor var. drummondii
intro: Sorghum bicolor var. drummondii, also known as Redstem Teaweed or Drummond's Redstem, is a plant species that belongs to the sorghum family, characterized by its reddish-purple stems and leaves. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and combat infections. The health benefits of Sorghum bicolor var. drummondii include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and provide antioxidant properties, making it a valuable herb for overall well-being. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
